title: calliandra houstoniana
intro: Calliandra houstoniana, also known as the Powder Puff or Mexican Bird's Tongue, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Calliandra houstoniana include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and treating wounds, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, where it is often combined with other plants to enhance its medicinal effects.
